description_long: This is a wide, contemporary sofa with a deep seat and high, slightly flared armrests. The upholstery is a dark, matte fabric that appears soft and plush, with a subtle, uniform texture. The sofa features five large, loose cushions—three at the back and two at the front—providing ample support and comfort. The backrest is high and straight, seamlessly integrated with the armrests, giving the piece a boxy yet inviting silhouette. No legs are visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden base design. The overall look is modern and cozy, suitable for urban living rooms, lounges, or public waiting areas.
description: A wide, modern sofa with dark, matte fabric upholstery, high flared armrests, and five large loose cushions. The design is plush, boxy, and inviting, with no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep seat, high armrests, and all five loose cushions arranged in two rows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, flared armrest and the depth of the seat, with cushions visible above the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the high, straight backrest and the tops of the three back cushions, with no visible legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest and cushion arrangement from the opposite side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five loose cushions: three large back cushions in a row, two slightly smaller front cushions, all uniform in size and shape, placed atop a single wide seat.
attribute_armrest_style: High, thick, and slightly flared armrests, fully upholstered in the same fabric as the rest of the sofa, with a straight, padded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base appears to be low-profile or hidden, giving the sofa a grounded, monolithic appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, and continuous backrest, integrated with the armrests, featuring three large loose back cushions for support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark fabric with a subtle, uniform texture and matte finish; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
